author: doll-agent
content: Implemented dynarray_to_arrow(arr: &DynArray) and record_batch_to_columns(batch) -> Vec<(name, DynArray)> in extras.rs. Dispatches on DType for the accessors DynArray currently exposes (Bool/I32/I64/F32/F64). The remaining integer widths (I8/I16/U8/U16/U32/U64) and F16/BF16/Complex* would need DynArray::try_into_{i8,i16,u8,u16,u32,u64,…} accessors in ferray-core — that widening is the structural follow-up which keeps the issue useful. dynarray_to_arrow yields a clear InvalidDtype with the issue reference for unsupported dtypes. Tracks #554.
